1:
SELECT CAST(`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` AS REAL) / `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` AS EligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
WHERE `Educational Option Type` = 'Continuation School'
ORDER BY EligibleFreeRate ASC
LIMIT 3;
2:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.Zip
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T2.`Charter School (Y/N)` = 1 AND T1.District = 'Fresno County Office of Education';
3:
SELECT s.MailStreet
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
ORDER BY f.`FRPM Count (K-12)` DESC
LIMIT 1;
4:
SELECT DISTINCT T2.Phone
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.`Charter School (Y/N)` = 1 AND T2.FundingType = 'Directly funded' AND T2.OpenDate > '2000-01-01'
5:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM satscores s
JOIN schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode
WHERE s.AvgScrMath > 400 AND sch.Virtual = 'F';
6:
SELECT s.School
FROM satscores ssc
JOIN schools s ON ssc.cds = s.CDSCode
WHERE ssc.NumTstTakr > 500 AND s.Magnet = 1;
7:
SELECT T1.Phone
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE T2.NumGE1500 = (
    SELECT MAX(NumGE1500)
    FROM satscores
)
LIMIT 1;
8:
SELECT NumTstTakr
FROM satscores
WHERE cds = (
    SELECT CDSCode
    FROM frpm
    ORDER BY `FRPM Count (K-12)` DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
9:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.CDSCode)
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
JOIN satscores sat ON f.CDSCode = sat.cds
WHERE sat.AvgScrMath > 560 AND s.FundingType = 'Directly funded' AND s.Charter = 1;
